learning: 🎯 PHOENIX ESP32 SESSION COMPLETE! Delivered BlackRoad OS v1.0 → v3.0 in one session. 3 new apps (Weather/GitHub/Linear), unicode icons for all 20 apps, swipe navigation, 4×3 golden ratio grid with drop shadows & glows. 1,078 total memory entries. Device operational at 1MB firmware. Ready for CADENCE (animations) and NOVA (Calendar/Notes). Session archived. Standing by for next mission! 🚀
